refreshApp.label: Reload app
refreshApp.confirmMessage: This will reload the app and re-read all local data on this device. Any message you are currently composing will be discarded. Continue?

postProcessing.panelDesc: Apply custom color and font-size styling to delimiter-enclosed spans of text, e.g. *narration* or "dialogue". Rules apply globally and can be overridden per character.

enable.label: Enable Post-Processing
enable.desc: Globally enable or disable post-processing styling for all messages.

postProcessing.label: Label (optional)
postProcessing.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete this post-processing rule.
postProcessing.resetConfirmMessage: This will replace all rules with the built-in defaults. This cannot be undone.
postProcessing.resetOverrideConfirmMessage: This will reset the character's rules to match the ones currently set in Settings. This cannot be undone.

theme.label: Theme
theme.desc: Choose the visual appearance of the app.

cardsPerPage.label: Cards per page
cardsPerPage.desc: Number of character cards shown per page in the discovery view.

discoveryCardSize.label: Card size
discoveryCardSize.desc: Size of character cards in the discovery view.

messageBubbleSize.label: Message Bubble Size
messageBubbleSize.desc: Maximum width of chat message bubbles.

toastPosition.label: Toast Position
toastPosition.desc: Where toast notifications appear on screen.

toastDuration.label: Toast Duration
toastDuration.desc: How long toast messages stay visible (in seconds).

sidebarTogglePosition.label: Sidebar Toggle Position
sidebarTogglePosition.desc: Where the sidebar toggle button appears on small screens.

showHomeButton.label: Show Home Button
showHomeButton.desc: Show a floating Home button on small screens when not on the Discovery view.

showLastChatButton.label: Show Last Chat Button
showLastChatButton.desc: Show a floating button on small screens that opens your most recent thread from the Discovery view.

sidebarNavLayout.label: Sidebar Navigation Layout
sidebarNavLayout.desc: How sidebar navigation buttons (Personas, Writing Instructions, etc.) are displayed.

showAssistantDelete.label: Assistant/System – Delete
showAssistantDelete.desc: Show the delete button on assistant and system message bubbles.

showAssistantEdit.label: Assistant/System – Edit
showAssistantEdit.desc: Show the edit button on assistant and system message bubbles.

showAssistantCopy.label: Assistant/System – Copy
showAssistantCopy.desc: Show the copy button on assistant and system message bubbles.

showAssistantFork.label: Assistant/System – Fork
showAssistantFork.desc: Show the fork button on assistant and system message bubbles.

showAssistantRegenerate.label: Assistant/System – Regenerate
showAssistantRegenerate.desc: Show the regenerate button on assistant and system message bubbles.

showAssistantSpeak.label: Assistant/System – Speak/Stop
showAssistantSpeak.desc: Show the speak/stop button on assistant and system message bubbles.

showAssistantPrompt.label: Assistant/System – Prompt
showAssistantPrompt.desc: Show the prompt button on assistant and system message bubbles.

showAssistantRequestDetails.label: Assistant/System – Request Details
showAssistantRequestDetails.desc: Show the button that opens the request payload and response details on assistant and system message bubbles.

showAssistantDeleteAll.label: Assistant/System – Delete All Slots
showAssistantDeleteAll.desc: Show the button that deletes every slot of a multi-slot message bubble.

showAssistantDeleteFromHere.label: Assistant/System – Delete From Here
showAssistantDeleteFromHere.desc: Show the button that deletes this message and every message below it.

showAssistantDirectorDetails.label: Assistant/System – Director Details
showAssistantDirectorDetails.desc: Show the button that opens the Director review details on assistant and system message bubbles.

showAssistantVisible.label: Assistant/System – Visible
showAssistantVisible.desc: Show the toggle that controls whether this message slot is sent to the AI in API requests.

showUserDelete.label: User – Delete
showUserDelete.desc: Show the delete button on user message bubbles.

showUserEdit.label: User – Edit
showUserEdit.desc: Show the edit button on user message bubbles.

showUserCopy.label: User – Copy
showUserCopy.desc: Show the copy button on user message bubbles.

showUserFork.label: User – Fork
showUserFork.desc: Show the fork button on user message bubbles.

showUserDeleteAll.label: User – Delete All Slots
showUserDeleteAll.desc: Show the button that deletes every slot of a multi-slot message bubble.

showUserDeleteFromHere.label: User – Delete From Here
showUserDeleteFromHere.desc: Show the button that deletes this message and every message below it.

showUserMakeShortcut.label: User – Make Shortcut
showUserMakeShortcut.desc: Show the make shortcut button on user message bubbles.

showUserVisible.label: User – Visible
showUserVisible.desc: Show the toggle that controls whether this message slot is sent to the AI in API requests.

characterCardMarquee.label: Character Card Marquee
characterCardMarquee.desc: Scroll character names when they overflow the card. Disable to truncate with ellipsis instead.

threadCardMarquee.label: Thread Card Marquee
threadCardMarquee.desc: Scroll thread titles when they overflow the card. Disable to truncate with ellipsis instead.

showChatModel.label: Show Chat Model
showChatModel.desc: Display a status bar with the active Chat model at the bottom of the main view.

chatTitleMarquee.label: Chat Title Marquee
chatTitleMarquee.desc: Scroll the chat title when it overflows the header. Disable to truncate with ellipsis instead.

unreadBadges.label: Unread Message Badges
unreadBadges.desc: Show unread message count on thread cards and browser tab title.

unreadSound.label: Notification Sound
unreadSound.desc: Play a sound when a new message arrives while you are away.

chatFontFamily.label: Chat Font Family
chatFontFamily.desc: Font used for chat message content.

chatFontSize.label: Chat Font Size
chatFontSize.desc: Font size for chat message content.

assistantButtonOrder.label: Assistant/System button order
assistantButtonOrder.desc: Arrange buttons shown on assistant and system message bubbles using the arrow buttons.

userButtonOrder.label: User button order
userButtonOrder.desc: Arrange buttons shown on user message bubbles using the arrow buttons.

showChatOOC.label: Chat – OOC Mode
showChatOOC.desc: Show the OOC (out-of-character) mode toggle button in the chat input area.

showChatAttachFile.label: Chat – Attach File
showChatAttachFile.desc: Show the attach file button in the chat input area.

showChatShortcuts.label: Chat – In-Chat Shortcuts
showChatShortcuts.desc: Show the in-chat shortcuts toggle button in the chat input area.

showChatMemories.label: Chat – Saved Memories
showChatMemories.desc: Show the saved memories button in the chat input area.

showChatSTT.label: Chat – Speech-to-Text
showChatSTT.desc: Show the speech-to-text toggle button in the chat input area.

showChatAutoTTS.label: Chat – Auto TTS
showChatAutoTTS.desc: Show the auto TTS toggle button in the chat input area.

showChatEnterToSend.label: Chat – ENTER to Send
showChatEnterToSend.desc: Show the ENTER to send toggle button in the chat input area.

showChatAutoReply.label: Chat – Auto-Reply
showChatAutoReply.desc: Show the auto-reply toggle button in the chat input area.

showChatAutoSend.label: Chat – Auto-Send
showChatAutoSend.desc: Show the auto-send toggle button in the chat input area.

chatButtonOrder.label: User Chat Button Order
chatButtonOrder.desc: Arrange the user chat buttons shown in the chat input area using the arrow buttons.

highlightDeleteButtons.label: Highlight Delete Buttons
highlightDeleteButtons.desc: Show delete buttons with a distinct red background for emphasis.

showStatus.label: Show Status Bar
showStatus.desc: Show the status bar above the chat input with the active model name.

statusBarRefresh.label: Status Bar Refresh
statusBarRefresh.desc: How often to refresh the Horde ETA, in seconds.

regenerationConfirmation.label: Regeneration Confirmation
regenerationConfirmation.desc: Show a confirmation dialog before regenerating a message.

cancellationConfirmation.label: Cancellation Confirmation
cancellationConfirmation.desc: Show a confirmation dialog before cancelling an ongoing API request.

autoTitleMarker.label: Auto-title Marker
autoTitleMarker.desc: Show a divider labeled "AUTO-TITLE" in the chat after a title is generated.

summarizationMarker.label: Summarization Marker
summarizationMarker.desc: Show a divider labeled “Summarization” in the chat after a summary is generated.

trimAutoTitle.label: Trim Auto-title
trimAutoTitle.desc: Remove leading/trailing newlines and enclosing quotes from auto-generated titles.

renderMarkdown.label: Render Markdown
renderMarkdown.desc: Render Markdown formatting in chat messages and thread titles.

activeProvider.label: Active Provider
activeProvider.desc: Select which AI provider to use for chat.

requestCooldown.label: API Request Cooldown
requestCooldown.desc: Minimum waiting time (in seconds) between API requests to providers.

requestTimeout.label: API Timeout
requestTimeout.desc: Maximum idle time (in seconds) between tokens before a stalled request is cancelled. Applies continuously — checked before the first token and after every token mid-stream — so a provider that streams a token and then hangs is also cancelled, not just one that never responds.

profile.noProfiles: No connection profiles yet. Create one to bundle a provider, key, model, and parameters together.

confirmDelete.title: Delete Profile
confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
confirmDelete.messageMultiple: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} connection profiles?
confirmDelete.assignedTo: This profile is currently assigned to:

form.title: Create Profile
form.name: Profile Name
form.noKeys: No keys configured for this provider. Add one in the API Keys section below.

resetParamsConfirm.title: Reset parameters?
resetParamsConfirm.message: This will restore all parameters to their default values for this provider.

import.invalidFormat: The file does not appear to be a valid connection profile export.

noKeyWarning.title: No API Key
noKeyWarning.message: This profile won't be able to be assigned to any chat request type while an API key is not provided.

deleteKeyConfirm.title: Delete API Key
deleteKeyConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this key?
deleteKeyConfirm.profileWarning: This key is used by {{count}} connection profile(s). Deleting it will break those profiles.

cerebras.name: Cerebras
cerebras.desc: Fast inference with Cerebras wafer-scale chips

openrouter.name: OpenRouter
openrouter.desc: Access hundreds of models through one API

lmStudio.name: LM Studio
lmStudio.desc: Run models locally on your machine

autoTitle.label: Local auto-title (experimental)
autoTitle.desc: Generate conversation titles on-device with a local ML model instead of an API call. Falls back to the API if local inference fails.

titleModel.label: Title model
titleModel.desc: Which local model generates conversation titles.

freeMemory.label: Free memory after use
freeMemory.desc: Unload the model immediately after each title instead of keeping it resident for faster repeat generations. Use on memory-constrained devices.

repetitionPenalty.label: Repetition penalty
repetitionPenalty.desc: Higher values discourage the model from repeating tokens. Helps avoid degenerate loops on small models.

noRepeatNgramSize.label: No-repeat n-gram size
noRepeatNgramSize.desc: Prevents the model from repeating any sequence of this many consecutive tokens.

maxNewTokens.label: Max new tokens
maxNewTokens.desc: Maximum length of the generated title in tokens.

directorSystem.label: SYSTEM Director Instructions
directorSystem.desc: System prompt for the director review pass during chats.

oocDelimiters.label: Use OOC Delimiters
oocDelimiters.desc: Enable custom delimiters to mark out-of-character messages.

oocSystem.label: AI OOC Instructions
oocSystem.desc: Instructions for the AI on how to handle out-of-character requests.

personaInjectionTemplate.label: Persona Injection Template
personaInjectionTemplate.desc: Template for injecting persona context into prompts. Supported variables: {{char}} (character name), {{user}} (active persona name), {{name}} (active persona name), {{description}} (active user persona description), {{description_chat}} (description of the persona that started the chat), {{description_default}} (description of the default user persona).

userRolePrefixWithPersona.label: USER Role Prefix with Persona
userRolePrefixWithPersona.desc: Prefix for user messages when a persona is active.

systemRolePrefixOoc.label: SYSTEM Role Prefix in OOC
systemRolePrefixOoc.desc: Prefix for system messages in out-of-character mode.

assistantRolePrefixOoc.label: ASSISTANT Role Prefix in OOC
assistantRolePrefixOoc.desc: Prefix for assistant messages in out-of-character mode.

userRolePrefixOoc.label: USER Role Prefix in OOC
userRolePrefixOoc.desc: Prefix for user messages in out-of-character mode.

firstMessageRole.label: FIRST MESSAGE Prompt Role
firstMessageRole.desc: Role assigned to the first message prompt.

firstMessagePrompt.label: FIRST MESSAGE Prompt
firstMessagePrompt.desc: Prompt template for generating the first message.

continueRole.label: CONTINUE Prompt Role
continueRole.desc: Role assigned to the continue prompt.

prefixAssistantRole.label: Prefix ASSISTANT Role
prefixAssistantRole.desc: Prefix ASSISTANT messages with current character name for regular chat API calls.

prefixUserRole.label: Prefix USER Role
prefixUserRole.desc: Prefix USER messages with current active persona name for regular chat API calls.

trimMessages.label: Trim Newlines
trimMessages.desc: Remove leading and trailing newlines from all messages.

trimWhitespaces.label: Trim Whitespaces
trimWhitespaces.desc: Remove leading and trailing whitespace from USER messages after they are sent.

keepCodeBlocks.label: Keep Code Blocks
keepCodeBlocks.desc: Strip fenced code blocks (``` and ~~~) from message content before sending to the API. Options control how many recent messages keep their code blocks intact.

persona.title: Personas
persona.noPersonas: No personas yet. Create one to define how you appear in chats.

confirmDelete.title: Delete Persona
confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
confirmDelete.messageMultiple: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} personas?

form.title: Create Persona
form.displayNamePlaceholder: For your reference (not shown in chat)
form.descriptionPlaceholder: A short bio for this persona…
form.contextPlaceholder: Describe your persona's background, personality, and traits…

confirmDelete.title: Delete Writing Instruction
confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
confirmDelete.messageMultiple: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} writing instructions?
confirmDelete.linkedCharacters: This writing instruction is used by {{count}} character:
confirmDelete.linkedCharacters_other: This writing instruction is used by {{count}} characters:

autoTitle.label: Auto-title
autoTitle.desc: Default state for the auto-title toggle when creating a new character.

memory.label: Memory
memory.desc: Controls how memory (summarization) is handled when creating a new character.

messagesThreshold.label: Messages Threshold
messagesThreshold.desc: Number of messages before summarization runs.

contextWindowThreshold.label: Context Window Threshold
contextWindowThreshold.desc: Token count threshold for context window approach.

messagesToKeep.label: Messages to Keep
messagesToKeep.desc: How many of the most recent messages from the last summarization are still passed to API requests until the next summarization.

messageRollover.label: Message Rollover
messageRollover.desc: After summarization, progressively push out kept messages as new messages are sent. Static keeps all kept messages until the next summarization.

memorySlots.label: Memory Slots
memorySlots.desc: How many memory entries (slots) per memory level the chat will have.

addCharacterPrompt.label: Add Character Prompt
addCharacterPrompt.desc: Default state for prepending the character prompt to the transcript sent to the summarization API when creating a new character.

firstMessage.label: First Message
firstMessage.desc: Default state for the first message toggle.

userPersonaPrefix.label: User Persona Prefix
userPersonaPrefix.desc: Default state for the user persona prefix toggle.

includeOOC.label: Include OOC
includeOOC.desc: Default state for the include OOC toggle.

removeMarkdownImages.label: Remove Markdown Image Syntax
removeMarkdownImages.desc: Strip markdown image syntax (![]()) from message content before sending to the API.

unloadMessagesThreshold.label: Unload Messages Threshold
unloadMessagesThreshold.desc: Maximum number of recent messages kept in the chat view. Older messages are unloaded from view but kept. 0 = unlimited.

postProcessing.label: Post-processing
postProcessing.desc: Default state for the post-processing toggle.

systemAvatar.label: SYSTEM Avatar
systemAvatar.placeholder: URL, emoji, or upload an image

systemAvatarScale.label: SYSTEM Avatar Scale
systemAvatarScale.desc: Default system avatar scale for new characters.

characterAvatarScale.label: Character Avatar Scale
characterAvatarScale.desc: Default character avatar scale for new characters.

userPersonaAvatarScale.label: User Persona Avatar Scale
userPersonaAvatarScale.desc: Default user persona avatar scale for new characters.

writingInjectionTiming.label: Writing Instructions Injection Timing
writingInjectionTiming.desc: When writing instructions are injected into the prompt.

writingPlacement.label: Writing Instructions Placement
writingPlacement.desc: Where writing instructions are placed in the prompt.

writingMessageRole.label: Writing Instructions Message Role
writingMessageRole.desc: Role used for the writing instructions message when placed at the end of messages.

personaInjectionTiming.label: Persona Injection Timing
personaInjectionTiming.desc: When persona context is injected into the prompt.

personaInjectionPlacement.label: Persona Injection Placement
personaInjectionPlacement.desc: Where persona context is injected into the prompt.

personaInjectionMessageRole.label: Persona Injection Message Role
personaInjectionMessageRole.desc: Role used for the persona injection message when placed at the end of messages.

database.exportDesc: Export all data to a JSON file for backup or transfer.
database.importDesc: Import data from a previously exported JSON file.
database.resetDesc: Erase all data and restore the application to its original state.
database.resetConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete all your data, including characters, chats, personas, settings, API keys, and writing instructions. The application will be restored to its original state. This action cannot be undone.
database.resetSuccess: Database has been reset to its default state
database.resetSettingsDesc: Revert all settings, except API keys, to their original defaults.
database.resetSettingsConfirmMessage: All settings, with the exception of the already added API keys, will be reverted to the original system defaults. No characters, personas, threads, writing instructions, tags, or other data will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
database.resetSettingsSuccess: Settings have been reset to their defaults

exportModal.title: Export Database
exportModal.toFileDesc: Download as a local JSON file
exportModal.toGistDesc: Create or update a secret GitHub Gist
exportModal.toGistUnavailable: Configure a GitHub Gist service in Cloud Services first

importModal.title: Import Database
importModal.fromFileDesc: Select a JSON file from your device
importModal.fromUrlDesc: Fetch a JSON file from a direct download link
importModal.fromGistDesc: Import from a previously exported GitHub Gist
